surfaces.label: Authentication and session controls
surfaces.notes: Reviewed auth and session controls; fixed Compose secret fallback.

surfaces.label: Notes tasks tags versions
surfaces.notes: User and workspace scoping reviewed; tag update response leak corrected.

surfaces.label: AI settings and provider requests
surfaces.notes: Personal base URLs restricted to built-in or operator-approved HTTPS origins; Calendar OAuth credentials redacted.

surfaces.label: Telegram integration
surfaces.notes: Bot-enabled webhook requires secret-token; link codes use crypto randomness and atomic consumption.

surfaces.label: Attachment route and storage
surfaces.notes: Ownership/path pass review; chunked multipart needs platform or streaming body cap.

surfaces.label: Note and workspace exports
surfaces.notes: Ownership/archive names pass review; full workspace ZIP needs aggregate quota or streaming.

surfaces.label: Google Calendar OAuth
surfaces.notes: State cookies and authenticated storage reviewed; credentials encrypted and not returned to clients.

surfaces.label: Markdown preview and Mermaid
surfaces.notes: Markdown sanitation and Mermaid strict mode reviewed; no surviving cross-user rendering path.

surfaces.label: Compose and MinIO profile
surfaces.notes: Static session and MinIO defaults removed; MinIO ports no longer published.

explicitExclusions.reason: Generated build output; source is authoritative.
Migrations contain no externally reachable executable sink.
Presentational surfaces; targeted sink review found no privileged control.

deferred.reason: Route Handler formData parsing occurs before an enforceable limit for chunked bodies; needs deployment body cap or streaming multipart.
Workspace export reads all attachments and concatenates archive buffers; needs streaming ZIP plus quota/concurrency policy.
